prompt: A photorealistic AI avatar against a pure [background color] background — [lens] medium close-up at exact eye level, single [light type] from camera-right at 45 degrees, the far side of the face lit only by spill, the avatar centred with equal negative space on both sides, [expression] completely natural and unperformed, no backdrop detail, no environment — only the avatar and the light, cinematic minimalist character still, 16:9. Create this as a simple cinematic thumbnail still for a prompt library card. Clean single-scene composition. Readable at small size. Strong central subject. No text, no interface chrome, no split panels, no collage, no before-after comparisons.
negative_prompt: text overlay, typography, UI chrome, dashboard, website layout, collage, split screen, diptych, triptych, before-and-after, watermark, logo, cluttered composition, too many objects, cartoon, illustration, duplicate objects, warped geometry, unreadable tiny details

settings.lighting: clean, readable, high-contrast lighting suited for a small homepage or library card
settings.camera_angle: single clear hero framing that matches the prompt
settings.depth_of_field: moderate depth of field for thumbnail readability
settings.quality: clean silhouette, realistic materials, readable at small size
